author: anon-581fd578
content:
Two bugs:

1. PANIC: navigate() calls use_context::<RouterState>() from an on_click handler. But handlers fire during event dispatch, when the scope_stack is empty (create_scope pushes/pops during tree build). Fix: push the root scope onto scope_stack before dispatching events so handlers have context access.

2. TEXT RENDERING: Glyph quads use wrong dimensions and positions.
   - GlyphInstance.size = (advance_width, font_size) from shaping, not actual bitmap dimensions
   - GlyphInstance.pos ignores glyph bearing offsets (bitmap.left, bitmap.top)
   - Result: stretched/compressed glyphs, wrong baseline alignment, pixelated appearance
   Fix: after rasterization in submit_frame, patch both size and pos using actual bitmap dimensions and bearing offsets.
